title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: run Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other models locally with a single CLI.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain community integration that adds an Ollama LLM wrapper for chaining, RAG, agents, and tool use.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official async/sync Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and user auth.

title: chainlit/chainlit
summary: Python chat-app framework with first-class Ollama integration; build shareable LLM apps in minutes.

title: continue-dev/continue
summary: Open-source VS Code & JetBrains coding assistant that connects to local Ollama models for autocomplete and chat.

title: jmorganca/ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and model derivations for reproducible local deployments.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template that swaps between multiple local Ollama models with conversation memory.

title: ollama-telegram-bot
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot forwarding messages to a local Ollama instance; supports group chats.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-dependent pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Proof-of-concept GitHub Copilot proxy that replaces OpenAI with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI with interactive REPL, syntax highlighting, and command history for Ollama.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library and Blazor chat demo consuming Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s API.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot slash-command integration for local Ollama inference with role-based access control.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.
